name: agents.txt
description: Reads, parses, validates, and audits agents.txt and agents.json files against the v1.0 specification. Exposes six read-only tools so agents can verify any site’s agent-readiness without leaving the MCP transport.

tools.name: get_spec
tools.description: Fetch the agents.txt v1.0 specification (full text or by section).

tools.name: parse_agents_txt
tools.description: Parse a raw agents.txt file into a structured JSON object matching the agents.json schema shape.

tools.name: validate_agents_txt
tools.description: Validate an agents.txt file against the spec; returns errors and warnings.

tools.name: validate_agents_json
tools.description: Validate an agents.json file against the spec schema; returns errors, warnings, and notes.

tools.name: audit_site
tools.description: Fetch and audit a live site for agents.txt compliance (directives, schema, §4.5 serving headers, cross-file consistency).

tools.name: get_skill
tools.description: Fetch a skill package SKILL.md by name from the site’s skill index.

serverInfo.name: agents.txt
serverInfo.description: Reads, parses, validates, and audits agents.txt and agents.json files against the v1.0 specification. Exposes six read-only tools so agents can verify any site’s agent-readiness without leaving the MCP transport.
